text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer has returned once again, and with it,
summer camp. I was admittedly nervous
considering our sleepy start last year, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four. One, two, threeee. Pheew.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer! I'm ready to tackle my training
anytime!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I got plenty of sleep last night! And I
haven't forgotten to bring anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's grown quite a lot since last summer. And at
this rate, after this year's camp...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to take the Queen Elizabeth II Cup by
storm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure she's going to improve even further.
